data.title: Plugin features hardcode Python-specific tooling instead of polyglot config-driven commands
data.description: New hooks, scripts, and skills are being created with hardcoded Python-specific tooling (ruff, mypy, pytest, poetry, Python AST) instead of using configurable commands.* keys. This causes silent failures or skipped behavior on NextJS and Ruby projects. Suggested fix: add a CLAUDE.md rule — 'This plugin is required to be polyglot. Hooks, scripts, and skills MUST NOT hardcode Python-specific tooling. Use commands.* config keys for all language-specific operations.'
